title: trace-diff output
description: Result of overlaying two traces — facts, no verdicts.

trace_schema_version.description: The T1 record schema version the diff was computed against.
trace_schema_version.title: Trace Schema Version

clean.description: True when the two traces have NO divergence at any stage/atom.
clean.title: Clean

aligned.description: True when every stage matched on (stage, seq) — no structural divergence.
aligned.title: Aligned

tolerance_applied.description: Verbatim echo of the caller-owned tolerance (null when exact).
tolerance_applied.title: Tolerance Applied

first_divergence.description: The earliest diverging (stage, atom); null on a clean diff.

stages.description: One entry per aligned/structural position, in seq order: `{stage, seq, side, divergences: [{atom, kind, detail}]}` (side ∈ both | a_only | b_only).
stages.title: Stages

structural.description: Structural divergences (unmatched stages) in the T1 flag shape.
structural.title: Structural

render.description: Deterministic, self-describing markdown overlay (trusted-display; no verdicts).
render.title: Render

FirstDivergence.description:
The earliest diverging ``(stage, atom)`` — leads the render and the result.

``atom`` is ``null`` for a STRUCTURAL divergence (a stage present on one side
only); ``kind`` names the semantics that parted (``exact`` / ``set-delta`` /
…) or ``"structural"``.

seq.description: The diverging stage's seq (null only for a degenerate stage).
seq.title: Seq

atom.description: The diverging atom name; null for a structural divergence.
atom.title: Atom

kind.description: The comparison semantics that parted, or 'structural'.
kind.title: Kind

detail.description: The factual one-line difference (never a verdict).
detail.title: Detail

FirstDivergence.title: trace-diff first divergence

TraceEndpoint.description: One side's key echo + what the store held for it (absence disclosed).

present.description: False when the store held no trace for this key (disclosed).
present.title: Present

stage_count.description: Number of stage records read for this side.
stage_count.title: Stage Count

TraceEndpoint.title: trace-diff endpoint
